label: Watchlist
description: Instrument watchlist for the terminal tab. Thin adapter over the shared WatchlistPanel component — maps useTerminalData().instrumentsByCategory into WatchlistDefinition lists and drives selectedInstrument for the whole tab.

0.6.note: WatchlistPanel renders its own loading/empty state internally.

0.7.note: WatchlistPanel renders 'No instruments' empty state when category lists are empty.

0.8.note: No error surface in widget — errors from context propagated via WatchlistPanel empty state.

l0.notes: All L0 checks pass. Replaces archived instrument-bar-widget.tsx (WU-4, 2026-04-22).

1.3.note: orgId scope filters instrumentsByCategory in context.

1.5.note: strategyIds scope filters instruments to linked strategy instruments.

1.6.note: Empty scope shows all instruments (no hard gate on watchlist display).

1.7.note: instrumentsByCategory derived in use-terminal-page-data.ts from mock instrument data.

l1.notes: L1 pass. This widget is the instrument selection driver for the entire terminal tab.

l2.notes: Mock build passes post-WU-4 (commit dd2ec4b). tsc clean on terminal/ directory.

3.1.note: Read-only widget — no live/batch mode distinction; selection always enabled.

3.2.note: N/A — watchlist does not submit orders.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or interval in widget. WS connection is in terminal-data-context.

l3.notes: Agent checks pass. Human 3.3(verify instrument selection drives order-book/price-chart/order-entry)/3.4(N/A) required.

4.1.note: onSelectSymbol wired to setSelectedInstrument on terminal context. Tab (list) switching via setActiveListId with useEffect sync to selectedInstrument.category.

4.6.note: watchlists derived via useMemo over instrumentsByCategory.

5.1.note: Supports all asset classes present in instrumentsByCategory (crypto, equities, fx, etc.). One tab per category. Symbol rows show symbol, name, price, 24h change.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 9 tests covering render (symbol name/price display, footer count), category tabs (crypto tab renders, multi-category mapping), symbol selection (click + keyboard Enter → setSelectedInstrument), empty state (no instruments), and search filter (no match → No symbols). See tests/widgets/terminal/terminal-watchlist.test.tsx

7.4.note: TerminalWatchlistWidget PascalCase, useTerminalData useCamelCase, file kebab-case. CLEAN.

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function. CLEAN.

7.7.note: useMemo and useCallback used correctly with stable deps. useEffect syncs activeListId to category on external navigation. CLEAN.

l7.notes: L7 pass. Minimal widget — all display logic in shared WatchlistPanel.

8.1.note: No arbitrary text sizes in widget file. Typography in WatchlistPanel component. CLEAN.

8.3.note: Delegates entirely to shared WatchlistPanel. CLEAN.

8.4.note: WatchlistPanel renders button elements for symbol rows. Human keyboard nav check required.

8.5.note: Human check required — minW=2, minH=4, default 3×12.

keepSeparate.rationale: Scope selector widget that drives 5 consumers on the terminal tab. Kept separate per the Type B rule — folding a widget that drives 2+ consumers into one consumer would burn the shared scope.

relationships.notes: Replaces archived instrument-bar-widget.tsx (WU-4, 2026-04-22). Reuses shared components/trading/watchlist-panel.tsx. options-watchlist-widget.tsx uses the same panel for the options tab. Per-asset filter-chip config (discriminated union) is a future enhancement — out of scope for Phase 1.

dataContract.notes: instrumentsByCategory populated from WS market-data feed via terminal-data-context. Prices update in real-time; mock path uses static DEFAULT_INSTRUMENTS with simulated price ticks.

gaps: Per-asset filter chips (strike/DTE/IV for options, sector for equities) not yet implemented — Phase 2
Pin/unpin instrument support not wired to terminal context
coverage.notes: Instrument selection master for the terminal tab. Phase 2: adopt shared WatchlistPanel on sports/defi/predictions tabs with per-asset WatchlistFilterConfig discriminated union.

knownIssues: Pin/unpin (editable prop) not passed — terminal-watchlist does not support pinning yet
activeListId syncs only on category change, not on programmatic instrument selection from another widget
